summary: A clip from a televised press briefing carried on C-SPAN. A man in a dark suit speaks and gestures at a cluster of microphones inside a room marked with United States Department text, with uniformed officers standing behind him. A lower-third chyron reads DHS SECRETARY MULLIN BRIEFS ON IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT FUNDING, with a KANSAS CITY, MO location tag and a LIVE marker.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks and gestures at microphones with uniformed officers behind him, captioned about immigration enforcement funding.
